scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner misses persistent buyback compounders with no binary catalyst. AutoZone's $1.5B new buyback + 30% drawdown with no fundamental impairment = cleanest non-binary pick in universe.
Scanner ignores royalty companies without product catalysts. Fwd P/E 6.9 for a royalty compounder with $400M buyback and 2040s revenue visibility = highest quality/value combination per unit of risk.
Scanner overlooks mature-category cash machines. 63% op margin consumer cybersecurity at Fwd P/E 7.4 = $1.42B FCF with 18% FCF yield; no excitement, just cash.
Scanner treats 'known names' as covered. 63% drawdown from peak + Fwd P/E 9.3 + $3.12B FCF for enterprise SaaS market leader = deeply mispriced while everyone assumes it's 'already owned.'
Scanner flags as AI disruption risk, not value. Fwd P/E 7.1 for 89% gross margins with massive enterprise switching costs = AI disruption narrative creates a buying opportunity, not an exit.
Scanner misses steady national security compounders. $2.2B quarterly contract velocity with Beta 0.52 and $700 analyst consensus = highest-conviction defense play with no retail narrative.
Scanner catches names at highs, misses 52W lows. $1.58B WMD intelligence contract post-DOGE = ring-fencing confirmed; scanner would have flagged BAH 6 months ago.

Scanner underweights 'mega-caps' as already known. P/E 21 for 33% revenue growth at $577 = RARE and underappreciated; my independent screen found it by asking what quality business has anomalously cheap multiple.
Scanner treats 58% drawdowns as falling knives. PEG 0.6, 100% earnings growth, $75.50 consensus, 8/10 top funds owning it = scanner needs to distinguish drawdown anomalies from structural declines.

Scanner excludes gold sector from macro thesis. Best quality gold miner at Fwd P/E 11.5 with D/E 1.2x and $4.28B FCF = safest gold leverage play with 51% upside to consensus; missed because gold is 'macro not stock-specific.'
Scanner misses post-restructuring clarity events. Fwd P/E 5.9 + 4% yield + Versant spin = post-spin clarity trades are where value is unlocked; scanner doesn't model corporate actions.

Scanner ignores nuclear defense infrastructure. Triple-threat nuclear play (military propulsion + SMR + medical isotopes) with $1.4B Navy contracts and $8.65B backlog = non-headline story that's accumulating value quietly.
